data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- WisdomAI/
data.description: WisdomAI has introduced a new Federated Agentic Intelligence Platform designed to transform raw enterprise data into reliable decisions. The platform was launched on 6th March 2026. This initiative by WisdomAI aims to utilize advanced technology to enhance decision-making processes within organizations. The platform is expected to process large volumes of data efficiently, providing valuable insights for businesses to make informed decisions. The company has emphasized the importance of turning raw data into actionable intelligence. This new platform signifies a significant advancement in the realm of enterprise data analytics.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall: U.S.-Iran Conflict Sparks Market Upheaval As Nvidia Rallies; Credo, MongoDB Plunge Late
data.description: Stock futures for the Dow Jones experienced a decline as a result of the commencement of the U.S.-Iran conflict, causing significant turmoil in the stock market on Monday. A notable mover was Nvidia stock, which showed strong performance. However, Credo and MongoDB faced a considerable drop in their earnings. Overall, the Dow Jones Futures saw a fall due to the market upheaval caused by the conflict between the United States and Iran, with Nvidia rallying while Credo and MongoDB plunged late in response to their earnings.

data.title: Golconda Gold Graduates to Trading on the OTCQX
data.description: Today, on March 03, 2026, Golconda Gold Ltd. ("Golconda Gold" or "the Company") has officially qualified for trading on the OTCQX® Best Market. The Company can now be found under the ticker symbols TSX-V: GG and OTCQX: GGGOF. This announcement signifies a significant milestone for Golconda Gold as it enters the OTCQX® Best Market for trading.

data.title: Will Treasury markets experience volatility?
data.description: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the global economy contracted by approximately 3.5% in the past year due to the impact of the ongoing pandemic. The widespread lockdown measures have caused a significant decline in economic activities, with unemployment rates reaching as high as 10% in some regions. Furthermore, the OECD has predicted a slow recovery with a projected growth of around 4.2% in the upcoming year, dependent on successful vaccination efforts and effective stimulus measures. These challenging circumstances have highlighted the importance of global cooperation and coordinated efforts to address the economic crisis and facilitate a sustainable recovery.
Forget Tariffs, If Stock Market Crash Occurs Under Trump, These 3 Catalysts Will Be To Blame

data.title: Viper Energy Announces Pricing of Secondary Common Stock Offering by Diamondback Energy, Inc. and Certain Affiliates of EnCap Investments, L.P. and Oaktree Capital Management, L.P.
data.description: Viper Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: VNOM) based in Midland, Texas, revealed today the pricing details of a public offering for the sale of 17,391,304 shares of its Class A common stock at a price of $0.000001 per share. This offering, known as the Secondary Offering, is being conducted by Diamondback Energy, Inc. along with affiliated entities of EnCap Investments, L.P. and Oaktree Capital Management, L.P. (the “Selling Stockholders”). The anticipated gross income generated from this transaction is estimated to be around $798 million. Viper Energy, Inc. will not be gaining any proceeds from the sale of these shares by the Selling Stockholders. The proposed closing date for the Secondary Offering is slated for March 4, 2026, subject to the fulfillment of standard closing prerequisites.

data.title: Shareholders who lost money in shares of Navan, Inc. (NASDAQ: NAVN) should contact Wolf Haldenstein  immediately
data.description: The deadline for the lead plaintiff in the securities class action lawsuit against Navan, Inc. (NASDAQ: NAVN) and some of its officers is April 24, 2026. This announcement was made on March 7, 2026, by the Wolf Haldenstein Adler Freeman & Herz LLP. The lawsuit is on behalf of investors who bought shares in the company.

data.title: This is a test from PRN Test
data.description: Test from PRN Test reveals that on March 7, 2026, in Cleveland, a remarkable event occurred where "The Quick Brown Fox Jumps Over The Lazy Dog's Tail." This intriguing occurrence is significant as the Quick Brown Fox, with swift agility, leaped over the Lazy Dog's Tail. The event has generated curiosity and discussion, capturing the attention of many. Stay tuned for more updates on this fascinating development.

data.title: Marc Benioff Said Mass AI Layoffs Weren't Coming. Then Came A Brutal Week For White-Collar Jobs.
data.description: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff dismissed concerns about widespread white-collar job loss due to AI, despite warnings from others like Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei and OpenAI-backer Vinod Khosla. However, by the end of the week, the U.S. economy had already lost 92,000 jobs, with notable layoffs at companies like Morgan Stanley, Oracle, and Capital One. Benioff's statement on CNBC regarding the issue did not age well, as job cuts continued to make headlines. Block's 40% staff reduction was cited as a specific problem rather than indicative of a larger trend. Benioff's optimism contrasted with the growing concerns about AI's potential to replace up to half of entry-level white-collar jobs and as much as 80% of jobs in general as discussed by industry experts.

data.title: The 15th Five-Year Plan featuring opening up: China and the world sharing the future
data.description: In Beijing on March 7, 2026, it was reported that China.org.cn shared details on China's plans for greater openness. The 15th Five-Year Plan period (2026-2030) has commenced this year. During the "two sessions," China revealed its aim for a GDP growth rate ranging between 4.5 to 5 percent.

data.title: PureHealth Research Launches Doctor-Approved Natural GLP-1 Supplements Collection for Metabolic Support
data.description: PureHealth Research, based in Manassas, Virginia, revealed on March 7, 2026, a new line of botanical formulations. These products contain clinically tested components aimed at enhancing the body's GLP-1 production, promoting feelings of fullness, and improving metabolic health. The collection is designed to support overall wellness through natural ingredients.

data.title: Global Times: Deliver for real, and turn every policy into smiles on people's faces
data.description: On March 7, 2026, sources report that approximately 33 million households have been provided with financial support for raising children. Additionally, a comprehensive network of elderly care services that caters to both urban and rural regions has begun to be established. These updates were announced during a press briefing related to the fourth meeting of the 14th National People's Congress.

data.title: LDO price at $0.29 may reach $0.32 as indicators hint at rebound. Analysts predict $0.50 by year-end.
data.description: The stock LDO is currently trading at $0.29 with a bearish trend, although the Relative Strength Index (RSI) shows it is oversold indicating a possible increase in value. The important resistance level to watch is at $0.32, which, if surpassed, may lead to a rebound towards the analyst's year-end target of $0.50.

data.title: AAVE aims for $125 by mid-March 2026, trading at $109.87 with potential breakout to $137 as per analysts. Short-term consolidation expected before reaching $125.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AAVE is currently valued at $109.87 as it faces downward pressure in the market. However, experts are optimistic about a potential breakout towards $137. Technical analysis indicates a period of consolidation in the near future before a possible uptrend towards the $125 resistance mark.

data.title: General Dynamics Leads 5 Stocks Near Buy Points Amid Iran War Sell-Off
data.description: Healthcare company HCA Healthcare and retail giant TJX are approaching optimal buying levels. Defense contractor General Dynamics is also nearing a good entry point. In the wake of market volatility due to tensions with Iran, these are among the top five stocks to monitor for potential buying opportunities. Additionally, dividend-paying stocks such as AT&T and Equinix are highlighted as stocks worth keeping an eye on. This information was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: In HelloNation, Luxury Real Estate Expert Jud Whitlock of Atlanta Explores Why Buyers Are Expanding North
data.description: Recent insights from luxury real estate expert Jud Whitlock of Atlanta Fine Homes/Sotheby's International Realty shed light on the trend of Atlanta buyers relocating to Blue Ridge. As per a HelloNation article, this migration is driven by factors like affordability, natural beauty, and a tight-knit community in Blue Ridge. Whitlock emphasizes that while Atlanta's median home price stands at $350,000, Blue Ridge offers spacious properties with scenic views at a median price of $275,000. Additionally, the peaceful environment and outdoor recreational opportunities in Blue Ridge further attract buyers, proving to be a desirable alternative to the bustling city life of Atlanta.

data.title: Visitors become entrepreneurs, discover opportunities in Yunnan
data.description: On March 7, 2026, in Beijing, an increasing number of visitors are opting to extend their stays in Southwest China's Yunnan province to engage in entrepreneurial pursuits, enticed by the area's unique economic sectors and high quality of life. This trend underscores Yunnan's appeal as a destination for individuals seeking business opportunities, with undisclosed figures supporting the uptick in extended stays.

data.title: Hedera's HBAR price targets $0.12 recovery from $0.10 support, amid March consolidation period. Technicals hint at bullish momentum.
data.description: The forecast for the price of HBAR indicates a neutral momentum at $0.10, with technical analysis pointing towards a possible recovery reaching the resistance level of $0.12 if the support remains strong during the consolidation phase in March.

data.title: PEPE oversold at RSI 36.23, near lower Bollinger Band. Technicals signal potential bounce. Read more for insights.
data.description: The cryptocurrency PEPE is currently showing oversold signals, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 36.23 and trading close to the lower Bollinger Band. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a rebound from the current support levels.

data.title: WIF price tests $0.21 resistance, eyes $0.24 breakout level with support at $0.16. Short-term target: $0.21.
data.description: Summary of WIF Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the price target is $0.21. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), the forecast falls within the range of $0.17 to $0.25. For a bullish breakout, the price level to watch for is $0.24, while the critical support level stands at $0.16.
